2021-22 Memphis Tigers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 22-11 (13-5, 3rd in AAC MBB)

Coach: Anfernee Hardaway

PS/G: 75.2 (66th of 358)

PA/G: 68.3 (150th of 358)

SRS: 14.67 (22nd of 358)

SOS: 7.86 (45th of 358)

ORtg: 105.8 (117th of 358)

DRtg: 96.2 (70th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +1800

NCAA Tournament: (#9 seed in West)
Won West First Round (64-53) versus #8 Boise State
Lost West Second Round (82-78) versus #1 Gonzaga
